---
title: "BIO611 Final Project Analysis & Viz"
author: "Briana Roberson"
date: "2026-04-20"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```



```{r load libraries and packages}
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)




```

## First visualization: Observations of tricolored bats over time using GBIF species occurrence data

```{r bat map data exploration}

bat_occ <- data.table::fread("0032207-260409193756587.csv") #This is the dataset for the entire United States occurances 
str(bat_occ)

#Filter for occurances within state of Georgia only 
bat_occ_GA <- bat_occ %>% 
  filter(stateProvince == "Georgia") 

unique(bat_occ_GA$stateProvince) #just Georgia!
str(bat_occ_GA)

#A lot of the older entries (from journals, museum collections, etc) don't have coordinates, so we filter these out 
bat_map <- bat_occ_GA[!is.na(decimalLatitude) & !is.na(decimalLongitude)]
 
```


```{r}

```
